/usr/bin/ar qc libplatform_linux.a CMakeFiles/platform_linux.dir/virtual_clock.c.o CMakeFiles/platform_linux.dir/linux_system_control.c.o CMakeFiles/platform_linux.dir/linux_platform_runtime.c.o CMakeFiles/platform_linux.dir/linux_scheduled_action_queue.c.o CMakeFiles/platform_linux.dir/linux_run_controller.c.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libplatform_linux.a
